normalization_rules.strip_cui: Remove (CUI: XXXXX) from company name field
normalization_rules.strip_sc_prefix: Remove SC / S.C. prefix (archaic Romanian legal form)
normalization_rules.strip_chinese_if_latin_present: If field has both Chinese + Latin chars, keep only Latin
normalization_rules.fuzzy_match_threshold: 90% similarity or Levenshtein distance ≤ 3 against aliases
normalization_rules.uppercase_canonical: Store canonical forms in consistent case
